title: Korean Apple Muchim Salad
description: A refreshing salad made with crispy apples, spicy Korean chili flakes, and crunchy xeriscaped herbs.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine diced apples and chopped xeriscaped cilantro.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together rice vinegar, honey, and muchim.
3. Pour the dressing over the apple mixture and toss to coat.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
6. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
